ground_truth.title: Best daily news website for beginner?
ground_truth.author: LingoLover94
ground_truth.main_content: Best daily news website for beginner? - Discussion about finding easy English news sources for language learners. Suggestions include: BBC News (British English, no sensational language), BBC Learning English (dedicated to English learners), News in Levels (three different levels of English), Breaking News English (easy English news with printable handouts), TODAI English (Easy English News from Vietnam), USA Today (written at a lower level), MSN News, AP News, Reuters, Fox News, NY Post, and EuroNews. Users also suggest using ChatGPT to simplify news articles from regular news sites for beginners. The original poster specifically wanted to read all important news in English but found most sites only offer 4 articles per day and prefers reading over watching videos.
with: My partner watched/ watches BBC news… it's British English, and though I don't know how beginner friendly it is there's no sensational language like I've seen on American new channels, and I imagine that must make it easier to watch and understand.
As you, LingoLover94, mention CNN but feel it's too hard and charrich87 mentions the BBC News but is unsure of its level, I'll mention a BBC news site dedicated to English learners.
We write news in three different levels of English. We want to help you understand English more. Now all students can enjoy reading and listening to news.
You could try taking an article from a regular news site like apnews.com and use openai chatgpt to ask it to simplify the text.
I used to use EuroNews when I was a beginner in Spanish/French. Tend to be pretty short articles with good transcripts/translations into most European languages.

items.caption: TODAI English - Easy English News site showing daily news updates
News in Levels - World News for Students of English with three difficulty levels
Breaking News English - Easy English News Lessons and printable handouts
Fox News - Breaking News Updates and Latest News Headlines
New York Post - Breaking News, New York sports, business and entertainment news
